site.name: Vextrus
site.purpose: Marketing site for VextrusAI — an AI-native ERP for Bangladesh construction & real estate, led by an AI workforce of agents running on a 20-module engine.

product.name: Vextrus
product.description: An AI-native, multi-tenant ERP for Bangladesh construction & real estate. VextrusAI is an AI workforce of 23 agents (1 shipped flagship — the Drawing Estimator; 13 roadmap agents; 9 advisory agents) running on a 20-module ERP engine. Agents write to the books only through a 4-Eyes, approval-gated mechanism: an agent proposes a change via a registered command, and a named person must approve before it is committed.
